entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop affected by various stalk rot diseases.

entities.name: STALK ROTS
entities.description: Diseases of sorghum with great destructive potential.

entities.name: MACROPHOMINA PHASEOLINA
entities.description: Fungus that causes stalk rots in sorghum.

entities.name: FUSARIUM MONILIFORME
entities.description: Fungus that causes stalk rots in sorghum.

entities.name: ACREMONIUM STRICTUM
entities.description: Vascular pathogen causing leaf and stalk death in sorghum.

entities.name: LEAF AND STALK DEATH
entities.description: Condition caused by the pathogen Acremonium strictum.

entities.name: HIGH-YIELDING VARIETIES
entities.description: Sorghum varieties that tend to be highly susceptible to stalk rot diseases.

entities.name: GRAIN LOSSES
entities.description: The reduction in grain yield caused by stalk rots, ranging from 15% to 60%.

entities.name: FUNGI
entities.description: Organisms often associated with diseased roots and stalks in sorghum.

entities.name: BACTERIA
entities.description: Organisms often associated with diseased roots and stalks in sorghum.

entities.name: COMPLEX ETIOLOGY
entities.description: The nature of stalk rot diseases involving multiple associated fungi and bacteria.

entities.name: HOST RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the sorghum plant to resist specific stalk rot diseases.

entities.name: CHARCOAL ROT
entities.description: A specific type of stalk rot disease.

entities.name: FUSARIUM ROOT AND STALK ROT
entities.description: A specific type of stalk rot disease.

entities.name: ACREMONIUM WILT
entities.description: A specific type of stalk rot disease.
